heading: Appointment of Special Coordinator for water policy negotiations and water resources policy
label: 2686a Appointment of Special Coordinator for water policy negotiations and water resources policy
notes: Authority of Secretary of StateExcept as otherwise provided, Secretary of State to have and exercise any authority vested by law in any official or office of Department of State and references to such officials or offices deemed to refer to Secretary of State or Department of State, as appropriate, see and , set out as a note under .section 2651a of this titlesection 161(d) of Pub. L. 103–236section 2651a of this title

children.text: to coordinate the United States Government response to international water resource disputes and needs;
to represent the United States Government, whenever appropriate, in multilateral fora in discussions concerning access to fresh water; and
to formulate United States policy to assist in the resolution of international problems posed by the lack of fresh water supplies.

children.heading: Other responsibilities
children.label: b Other responsibilities
children.text: The individual designated under subsection (a) may carry out the functions of subsection (a) in addition to other assigned responsibilities.
